title: General Aeronautics
summary: Turned a complex drone portfolio into a clearer digital story buyers, partners, and operators could trust faster.
modalIntro: General Aeronautics builds drone systems across agriculture, defense, humanitarian response, and warehouse automation. As the portfolio expanded, the challenge was making that breadth easier to understand, trust, and navigate.
modalOutcomes: Reframed a broad drone portfolio into a sharper market story.
Made technical capabilities easier for non-technical audiences to understand.
Improved credibility across web, applications, and communication assets.
Built a stronger platform for future product and growth decisions.

modalSections.body: General Aeronautics had real depth across multiple drone categories, but that breadth was difficult to communicate clearly in one digital experience.
modalSections.title: Context

modalSections.body: Without a clearer narrative, technical breadth risked reading as fragmentation. Buyers, partners, and operators all needed a simpler path through what the company offered and why it mattered.
modalSections.title: Challenge

modalSections.body: Yuvabe paired a website revamp with brand refresh, UI/UX direction, and supporting content so product communication and credibility cues reinforced each other.
modalSections.title: What we changed

modalSections.body: The result was a clearer business story, more intuitive interfaces, and a stronger foundation for future launches and brand growth.
modalSections.title: Outcome

seoDescription: See how Yuvabe helped General Aeronautics turn a broad drone portfolio into a clearer digital story across website, product UX, and brand systems.

title: tvam
summary: Built Health and Policy Advisors plus a USMLE prep workflow that turned complex guidance tasks into one AI product experience users could navigate with confidence.
modalIntro: TVAM set out to simplify health guidance, policy support, and exam-prep workflows through advisor-style AI tools. The real challenge was making chat, retrieval, voice, and secure knowledge flows feel like one dependable product experience instead of a stack of separate AI features.
modalOutcomes: Built AI-powered Health and Policy Advisors plus a USMLE preparation tool.
Integrated chat-based AI, secure conversation storage, TTS/STT support, vector search, and file uploads.
Used RAG patterns and cloud deployment workflows across Google Cloud, Azure, and secure storage services.
Made complex health and policy workflows easier to navigate through clearer advisor-style product flows.

modalSections.body: TVAM was building AI tools across health guidance, policy support, and exam prep. As the scope expanded, those experiences had to feel like one usable product rather than a set of disconnected utilities.
modalSections.title: Context

modalSections.body: The work had to combine chat-based AI, voice interaction, document retrieval, secure conversation history, and file handling without making high-stakes workflows harder to trust or navigate.
modalSections.title: Challenge

modalSections.body: Yuvabe designed and deployed Health and Policy Advisors plus a USMLE support workflow, tying them together with RAG-backed retrieval, vector search, TTS/STT, secure storage, and cloud-ready infrastructure.
modalSections.title: What we changed

modalSections.body: The result was a more coherent advisor-style AI product suite that automated complex support flows, improved engagement, and gave users clearer help across health, policy, and exam-prep tasks.
modalSections.title: Outcome

title: KittyKat
summary: Built a generative AI fashion platform that turned product photos into realistic model visuals at scale with faster turnaround and less production overhead.
modalIntro: KittyKat needed a way to generate realistic fashion imagery at scale — without the delay and cost of repeated production shoots. The work focused on turning product-to-model image generation into a more reliable AI workflow with the output quality a premium fashion brand actually needs.
modalOutcomes: Built a generative AI fashion platform that automated product-to-model image generation.
Improved realism at scale through data preprocessing, model optimization, and advanced image-generation workflows.
Improved facial alignment, body proportions, and final image quality for premium brand presentation.
Enabled the client to generate thousands of visuals faster for stronger storytelling and customer engagement.

modalSections.body: KittyKat was positioned around AI-generated fashion visuals, but the real product challenge was not novelty alone. The platform had to turn ordinary product photos into realistic model imagery that a fashion brand could actually use across campaigns and commerce touchpoints.
modalSections.title: Context

modalSections.body: Generating fashion imagery with AI becomes difficult when realism breaks down. Facial alignment, body proportions, and consistency all needed to hold up well enough for premium presentation, while the workflow still had to move faster than traditional production.
modalSections.title: Challenge

modalSections.body: Yuvabe built the product-to-model generation workflow, then improved output quality through data preprocessing, model optimization, and hierarchical image refinement — tuning the pipeline to feel reliable, scalable, and aligned to real fashion use cases rather than generic AI output.
modalSections.title: What we changed

modalSections.body: The result was a generative AI fashion platform that reduced production delay, improved final image quality, and made it easier for the client to create large volumes of branded visuals for stronger storytelling and customer engagement.
modalSections.title: Outcome

seoDescription: See how Yuvabe built a generative AI fashion workflow for KittyKat that improved realism, reduced production delays, and scaled branded visual output.

items.title: Product-to-model pipeline
items.description: A landscape-oriented workflow for turning static product inputs into styled model imagery without the overhead of repeated shoots.

items.title: Prompt and variation control
items.description: A supporting generation layer that helps teams explore more brand-relevant outputs while keeping the workflow commercially usable.

items.title: Image quality tuning
items.description: Refinement passes focused on realism, body proportion, and facial consistency so AI visuals hold up for premium presentation.

items.title: Campaign-ready asset system
items.description: A scalable output layer that makes it easier to generate larger batches of visuals for storytelling, catalog, and brand content.

modalProofPoints.title: Automated product-to-model generation
modalProofPoints.description: Turned product photos into model visuals through a faster AI-led production workflow.

modalProofPoints.title: Improved realism and quality
modalProofPoints.description: Used data preprocessing and hierarchical refinement to improve proportion accuracy and premium visual output.

modalProofPoints.title: Scaled on brand visual production
modalProofPoints.description: Reduced image creation time and made it easier to produce larger volumes of usable campaign assets.

modalTestimonial.quote: The value of the work was not just faster image generation. It was building an AI visual pipeline that improved realism, reduced production delay, and made large-scale branded output far more usable.

title: Matrimandir

modalSections.title: Context
modalSections.body: Matrimandir sits at the heart of Auroville and draws thousands of visitors and seekers from around the world. The digital touchpoint needed to prepare visitors meaningfully — not just inform them.

modalSections.title: Challenge
modalSections.body: Designing for a sacred space requires restraint. The aesthetic and content had to convey depth and calm without overcrowding the experience or reducing the space to a tourist checklist.

modalSections.title: What we changed
modalSections.body: Yuvabe developed a contemplative visual language, information architecture centered on the visitor journey, and a content system that matched the dignity of the physical space.

modalSections.title: Outcome
modalSections.body: A more intentional digital presence that gave visitors and seekers a clearer, more resonant way to connect with Matrimandir before they arrived.

modalProofPoints.title: Honored the space's sacred character

modalTestimonial.quote: The design found a way to represent the space with the restraint and depth it deserves — making the digital touchpoint feel like a genuine extension of Matrimandir rather than a promotion of it.
